title: The Casino Becomes a Prison
description: On pages 18–19, this part focuses on the casino becomes a prison, keeping the scene centered on the conflict, choices, and stakes of the Alabasta arc.
scene: The Casino Becomes a Prison. The Straw Hats reach Rainbase while Marines, Baroque Works, and Crocodile’s casino pull every side into the same trap. This section presents the immediate scene beat before the dialogue continues.

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Yes, I've just been informed by the Millions.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Then welcome the little rats inside!

summary: This part develops the casino becomes a prison and pushes the Alabasta conflict closer to its next decisive turn.
